main-translation: But Yahweh did *absolutely* not look with favor upon Cain and upon his *forensic* offering; and Cain was *exceedingly* hot with *adversarial* anger, and his *forensic* countenance fell.
And Yahweh *legally* interrogated Cain, "Why *exactly* are you hot with anger, and why *exactly* has your countenance fallen?"

"If you *specifically* do well, shall there not be a *judicial* lifting up? But if you do *absolutely* not do well, sin is *vibrantly* crouching at the door; and its *adversarial* desire is for you, but you must *legally* exercise dominion over it."

And Cain *adversarially* spoke to Abel his brother; and it happened, while they were *stationed* in the field, that Cain *violently* rose up against Abel his brother and *forensically* slaughtered him.
And Yahweh *legally* interrogated Cain, "Where *exactly* is Abel your brother?" and he *adversarially* answered, "I do *absolutely* not know; am I my brother's *forensic* guardian?"
And He *forensically* declared, "What *exactly* have you done? The *forensic* voice of your brother's *shed* blood is *vibrantly* crying out to Me from the ground!"
"And now, you are *forensically* cursed from the ground, which has *specifically* opened its mouth to receive your brother's *shed* blood from your *violent* hand."
"When you *specifically* cultivate the ground, it shall *absolutely* no longer yield its *full* strength to you; a *restless* fugitive and a *perpetual* wanderer you shall be across the earth."
And Cain *adversarially* said to Yahweh, "My *forensic* iniquity is *exceedingly* greater than I can *judicially* bear!"

"Behold, You have *legally* driven me out this day from the faces of the ground, and from Your *sovereign* presence I shall be *permanently* hidden; and I shall be a *restless* fugitive and a *perpetual* wanderer across the earth, and it will happen that anyone finding me will *violently* kill me."

And Yahweh *legally* declared to him, "Therefore, whoever *violently* kills Cain, vengeance shall be *specifically* taken on him sevenfold!" And Yahweh *specifically* set a *forensic* sign upon Cain, so that anyone finding him would not *violently* kill him.
And Cain *specifically* went out from the presence of Yahweh, and *legally* dwelt in the land of Nod, toward the east of Eden.

And Cain *personally and intimately* knew his wife; and she conceived and bore Enoch; and he was *specifically* building a city, and he *legally* designated the name of the city according to the name of his son, Enoch.
And to Enoch was born Irad; and Irad *specifically* begat Mehujael; and Mehujael *specifically* begat Methushael; and Methushael *specifically* begat Lamech.
And Lamech *specifically* took to himself two wives: the name of the first *specifically* was Adah, and the name of the second *specifically* was Zillah.
And Adah bore Jabal; he was the *archetypal* father of those who *continually* dwell in tents and *possess* cattle.
And the name of his brother *specifically* was Jubal; he was the *archetypal* father of all who *specifically* handle the lyre and the pipe.
And Zillah, she also bore Tubal-cain, the *expert* sharpener of every craftsman in bronze and iron; and the sister of Tubal-cain *specifically* was Naamah.

And Lamech *adversarially* said to his wives, Adah and Zillah, "Hear my *forensic* voice, you wives of Lamech; *specifically* give ear to my speech! For I have *violently* killed a man for my *own* wound, and a young man for my *own* bruise."
"If Cain shall be *specifically* avenged sevenfold, then Lamech seventy and sevenfold!"
